title: PHPTRAVELS
description: Travel agency booking software for hotels, tours, flights, and car rentals. A full-stack SaaS platform offering end-to-end solutions to travel businesses. I collaborated with the core PHPTRAVELS team on modules, APIs, and booking engine optimization. The project involved working closely with cross-functional teams to ensure smooth integration of services, performance optimization, and robust security practices. The system was stress-tested for high concurrency scenarios, and CI/CD pipelines were used to manage deployments efficiently.
features: Optimized for mobile and tablet devices with responsive UI components
Implemented security best practices including rate-limiting, data encryption, and secure auth flows
short_detail: Travel agency booking software for hotels, tours, flights, and car rentals.
